ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aid_types" (
  "aid_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aid type */,
  "aid_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the aid type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aid_distribution" (
  "aid_distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aid distribution record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the countries table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of aid distribution */,
  "aid_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the aid_types table */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of aid distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, data entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., country, region, year) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of report generation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
